title: La Adelita
director: Guillermo Hernández Gómez, Mario de Lara
writer: Ernesto Cortázar, Emilio Gómez Muriel, Guillermo Hernández Gómez
actors: Leopoldo 'Chato' Ortín, Esther Fernández, Pedro Armendáriz
plot: Adela is a young girl who becomes part of the ranks of the Northern Division, a revolutionary army led by Pancho Villa during the Mexican Revolution.
